notes: Vendor- and technology-neutral consortium producing enterprise architecture and risk standards. Notable: TOGAF (enterprise architecture framework) and Open FAIR (factor analysis of information risk). Some materials are free; others require Open Group membership or paid certification.

match_nodes.description: TOGAF — The Open Group Architecture Framework

data.notes: TOGAF body of knowledge is free to access (registration required); certification, training, and supplementary deliverables are paid. Versioned as TOGAF 9, TOGAF 10, etc.

match_nodes.description: Open FAIR — Factor Analysis of Information Risk

data.official_name: Open FAIR — Factor Analysis of Information Risk
data.notes: Quantitative risk-analysis framework. Open Group publishes the Open FAIR Risk Taxonomy and Risk Analysis standards. Standards documents are free with registration; certification is paid.
